stemHtml: According to ICAO, the runway surface condition description of a runway with significant patches of standing water is…

options.a: The surface is covered by any visible dampness or water more than 3 mm deep within the intended area of use.
options.b: The surface is soaked but there is no standing water.
options.c: The surface shows a change of colour due to moisture.
options.d: The surface is not dry, but when the moisture on it does not give it a shiny appearance.
